entities.name: vosoritide
entities.context: Vosoritide is a C-type natriuretic peptide analog that was recently approved for improving growth in children with achondroplasia.

entities.name: hypochondroplasia

relations.evidence: Vosoritide is a C-type natriuretic peptide analog that was recently approved for improving growth in children with achondroplasia.
evaluate the safety and efficacy of vosoritide in children with hypochondroplasia... registered with ClinicalTrials.gov (NCT04219007)
Injection site reactions occurred in 83.3% of participants.
Hypochondroplasia is a rare autosomal dominant skeletal dysplasia due to activating variants in FGFR3.
Efficacy was similar to what has been reported in children with achondroplasia (FGFR3 disorder)
Annualized growth velocity increased by 2.26 standard deviations (SD)... during the treatment period versus the observation period.
Vosoritide was safe and effective in increasing growth velocity in children with hypochondroplasia.
